title: Assign Creator not doing what is expected

posts.author: Michael-PT (Michael Albers)
posts.cookedHtml:
I created an automation that doesn’t seem to do what is advertised.
“When an update is created, assign Creator as Person”.
However, it seems either the creator of the automation is assigned instead or the creator of the item is assigned instead of the creator of the update, as one would expect.

Am I missing something?

posts.author: Srestrepo (Sebastian)
posts.cookedHtml: Agree. This function not working and with the button function doesn’t update.

posts.author: DanielD (Daniel Dedek)
posts.cookedHtml: Do you have any update on this? I am having same issue.

posts.author: Michael-PT (Michael Albers)
posts.cookedHtml:
Was just scrolling through my posts in the community and came across this one. Still no change. Owner of the automation is assigned instead of the person who added the update.
But in hindsight, in our case I wouldn’t want to change the person every time someone adds an update.
